_publications._publicationTitle: Electrical stimulation of Schwann cells on electrospun hyaluronic acid carbon nanotube fibers.

_contextSnippet: WT SC showed the most proliferation at 72 hours...WT SC on HA-CNT fibers show significantly higher proliferation than all other conditions
details: WT SC showed the most proliferation at 72 hours and showed significantly higher proliferation than all other conditions on HA-CNT fibers
